channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.6
item.description:
### Fixed
- **Connection with full scopes** — Reverted to `openclaw-control-ui` client ID (only path that preserves operator scopes without device pairing) and added `Origin` header to WebSocket request so the gateway accepts it.
- Previous attempts with `gateway-client` and `openclaw-macos` passed handshake but got zero scopes due to gateway device identity requirements.
